raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A gray bowl is on a wooden table. A blue plastic container is to the right of the bowl. The bowl is a rigid, shallow container with a circular rim. STRATEGY - Reach the bowl at its rim for a stable grasp, lift it, and transport it to the blue container. Failure modes include dropping the bowl during transport or misaligning it with the container. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bowl rim; Step 2 grasp the rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport above the container; Step 4 place into the container.

Goal: inside(gray_bowl, blue_container)
Scene: gray_bowl, blue_container, table
Step 1: reach(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, gray_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, gray_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: holding(gray_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(gray_bowl)
Step 3: transport(gray_bowl -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  spatial: above(gray_bowl, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(gray_bowl)
  done_when: above(gray_bowl, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(gray_bowl -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(gray_bowl, blue_container) [completion]; released(gray_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(gray_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(gray_bowl, blue_container) AND released(gray_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
the rim of the gray bowl
an empty area inside the blue container
an empty area inside the blue container
